pages.text: A colossus is a giant golem built from a single block type. Assemble the large body, then place any mob head on the SIDE of the structure to bring it to life.

Only its owner can ride a colossus. You can't just right-click anywhere: $(o)jump and right-click the colossus's upper back$() to mount.$(br2)While mounted, $(o)left-click to swing its arms on command$(), or just steer it into enemies. Either way it soaks the damage that would otherwise hit you.
